posts.author: Webby0242 (Yvonne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Looking to allow for the editing of color and icon choices for activities.

Allow for the creation of same activity items with different colors to reflect teams.

Core/Essentials are determined by program and not operational functionality.

Capacity to have this feature assigned to workspaces rather than whole of account will also increase flexibility, but not essential.

What are you trying to achieve

Responds to a workforce with low levels of workplace literacy but capacity to identify their team and visual clues.

Existing icons appear aligned by color to type of task and hard coded. Update to increase flexibility for inclusive operational environment.
